ddls:
CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host who owns the listing */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the listing */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the listing is located */,
  "neighbourhood" TEXT /* Neighbourhood where the listing is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the listing */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the listing */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., private room, entire home/apt) */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the listing */,
  "last_review" TEXT /* Date of the last review */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the listing */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the listing */,
  "minimum_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for a booking */,
  "maximum_nights" INTEGER /* Maximum number of nights allowed for a booking */,
  "availability_365" INTEGER /* Availability of the listing over the next 365 days */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the listing */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the locations table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the host */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the host */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the host joined Airbnb */,
  "total_listings" INTEGER /* Total number of listings the host owns */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the host is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numeric rating for the review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the location is situated */,
  "neighbourhood" TEXT /* Neighbourhood where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate of the neighborhood */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of neighborhood amenities */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing the price belongs to */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the listing */,
  "log_price" REAL /* Logarithm of the price */,
  "log_minimum_nights" REAL /* Logarithm of the minimum number of nights */,
  "log_number_of_reviews" REAL /* Logarithm of the number of reviews */,
  "log_reviews_per_month" REAL /* Logarithm of the reviews per month */,
  "log_calculated_host_listings_count" REAL /* Logarithm of the calculated host listings count */,
  "log_availability_365" REAL /* Logarithm of the availability for 365 days */,
  "minimum_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for a booking */,
  "maximum_nights" INTEGER /* Maximum number of nights allowed for a booking */,
  "availability_365" INTEGER /* Availability of the listing over the next 365 days */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON column to store user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
